absorption: Massive selling pressure (Delta -15K) was absorbed by passive buyers at the vPOC, preventing a price breakdown.
dom_observation: Significant stacked bids are visible below the current price (60730-60850), while asks above are relatively thin, supporting a potential bounce.
reasoning: Fiyat, vPOC seviyesinde agresif satislari (buyuk negatif delta) absorbe etti ve dusmeyi reddetti; bu durum, alicilarin kontrolu ele aldigi bir donus sinyalidir.
